title: F-Tech
description: Adds useful blocks and items that don't break the game's balance too much
body:
F-Tech is a new mod that adds machines, blocks and items that help in various ways.



<details>
<summary>Blocks and machines (not a full list):</summary>

1. Solid fuel-based generator
1. Food-based generator
1. Lava-based generator
1. Biofuel-based generator
1. Honeycomb-based generator
1. Liquid tank
1. Energy cable 
1. Fluid pipe
1. Item pipe
1. Redstone cable
1. Pump
1. Fluid extractor
1. Item importer
1. Furnace heater - accelerates furnaces up to 3 times
1. 3D printer
1. Disenchanter
1. Bottle filler
1. Buffer
1. Miner's TNT - bigger explosion size, doesn't explode ore blocks
1. Accumulator
1. Block breaker
1. Drill - used by drill controller
1. Drill bit - used by drill
1. Drill controller - uses drills to break blocks
1. Box tier 1 - item container with 54 slots
1. Box tier 2 - item container with 72 slots
1. Box tier 3 - item container with 96 slots
1. Teleporter
1. Experience bank
1. Recycler - breaks down some items into other items
1. Tree harvester
1. Ore refiner - processes ores
1. Breeder
1. Chunk keeper - keeps 1 chunk loaded
1. Item exporter
1. Crop harvester


</details>



<details>
<summary>Items (not a full list)</summary>

1. Drainer - deletes fluids
1. TNT gun - shoots TNT
1. Titanium wrench - can rotate blocks, can break blocks of this mod instantly
1. Box upgrade 1 to 2
1. Box upgrade 2 to 3
1. Titanium tools and sword - stand between iron and diamond
1. Iron, diamond and netherite multitool - a combination of hoe, axe, pickaxe and shovel
1. Friendly mob container - can be used to transport friendly mobs
1. Universal mob container - can be used to transport any mob
1. Spawner transporter - can be used to transport spawners

</details>



 

To obtain most of this mod's items, you will need to use 3D printer. To craft 3D printer, you will need titanium ingots. Titanium production is a complex process, refer to the web manual for help. 3D printer needs energy, which you can supply via Solid fuel-based generator.

3D printer's, recycler's and ore refiner's recipes can be viewed in JEI.
